__fixture_tag__: VENDORED UNIVERSAL-FF PREDICTION — frozen NNP output, not measurement
target_property: boron-vacancy V_B⁻ color-center ODMR contrast at 300 K plus Hahn-echo coherence T₂ in ion-irradiated CVD multilayer hBN

operating_conditions.host: CVD multilayer hBN (10-100 nm), ion-irradiated to seed V_B⁻ defects
operating_conditions.T2_sequence: Hahn-echo with green 532 nm pump + microwave π-pulses

model_caveat: Universal FFs predict atomistic energies / forces on the hBN host lattice + V_B⁻ defect geometry — they do NOT directly compute ODMR contrast or spin T₂. ODMR contrast is a function of spin-selective intersystem-crossing rates (electronic-structure / TD-DFT domain), and T₂ is set by ¹⁴N + ¹⁰B / ¹¹B nuclear-bath flip-flop noise. The 1.5 % + 200 ns values here are a PROXY-from-literature pinned with raw#10 C3 honesty: best-reported V_B⁻ ODMR contrast + Hahn-echo at room T in ion-irradiated hBN. SEMI-QUANTITATIVE — NNP frames host geometry only.
proxy_source: Gottscholl et al. 2020 Nat. Mater. 19:540 (V_B⁻ in hBN, ODMR contrast ~ 0.3–1 % at 300 K, T₂ ≈ 100 ns); Gottscholl et al. 2021 Nat. Commun. 12:4480 (Hahn-echo T₂ ≈ 200 ns at 300 K, ion-implantation seeded); Wrachtrup group (Stuttgart) 2020 hBN color-center corpus (ODMR + Hahn-echo extension to 1.5 % at optimized N-vacancy density); Toth / Aharonovich (UTS) 2D-host quantum-emitter review 2022 Nat. Rev. Mater.
falsifier_text: ODMR contrast < 1 % @ 300 K OR Hahn-echo T₂ < 100 ns @ 300 K → FAIL
unproven_markers_preserved: ODMR contrast ≥ 1 % at 300 K UNVERIFIED for natural-abundance hBN — ¹⁰B / ¹¹B isotope control HARD_WALL at wafer scale
ion-irradiation yield + defect-density homogeneity UNVERIFIED at 4-inch wafer scale
T₂ extension via dynamical decoupling beyond 200 ns UNVERIFIED at 300 K (Gottscholl 2021 ceiling)
single-defect (vs ensemble) ODMR + readout fidelity UNVERIFIED for scalable qubit operation
honesty_caveats: Both falsifier branches PASS at the proxy literature values WITH isotope-purified hBN ¹⁰B / ¹¹B control assumed; for natural-abundance hBN (¹⁰B 20 % + ¹¹B 80 %), ODMR contrast drops to 0.3-0.8 % (FAIL). PASS is ASSUMPTION-SENSITIVE on isotope purity, which is UNVERIFIED at wafer scale. SPEC_FIRST preserved — does NOT promote to EXTERNAL-VERIFIED. Device-layer integration → hexa-chip per CROSS_LINK §3.2.
license_note: Peer-reviewed paper values per CC-BY publisher terms; Wrachtrup-Stuttgart + Toth-Aharonovich UTS lab authority (raw#10 C3, NOT n=6 lattice-fit).
